sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5472" key="a)mpedi/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμπεδίον</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμπεδιήρεις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμπέλαγος</orth>, should be written divisim <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἂμ</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πεδίον,</foreign> i.e. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνὰ πεδίον,</foreign> etc.</entryFree>
